title: Chipped Bark 60L
features: Plant root protection gives decorative element to flower beds and rockeries

description: Growmoor 60L Litre Chipped Bark Shavings 10-25mm A premium bark which can add that decorative element to your flower beds and rockeries whilst also helping to suppress weeds. Provides excellent weed suppression and plant root protection. Helps to retain moisture in the soil and mulching. Also ideal for creating pathways and childrens play areas. PLEASE NOTE THAT HEAVY DELIVERY APPLIES FOR THIS ITEM SO POSTCODE EXCLUSIONS WILL APPLY INCLUDING NORTHEN IRELAND, HIGHLANDS AND ISLANDS.
